query:
SELECT 
  r.id,
  q.questionId,
  q.questionText,
  q.sectionId,
  r.response,
  r.fileUrl,
  r.createdAt
FROM responses r
JOIN questions q ON r.questionId = q.id
JOIN organizations o ON r.organizationId = o.id
WHERE o.slug = 'srv-rrmc'
ORDER BY q.sectionId, q.questionId;
